title: Holography of new conformal higher spin gravities in 3d for low spins
summary: We study holography of the 3d Chern-Simons theory as a gauge theory of $so(3,2)$, $sl_4$ and $sl_5$ algebras. For the near horizon boundary conditions we comment solutions from several projectors from Chern-Simons to the metric formulation. These solutions are generalized BTZ solutions for our theories. We also study the classification according to $so(3,2)$ one parameter subgroups for obtained solutions.
